(are m) MINISTRY OF wAmn RESOURCE ' noerATroN New Delhi, the 1901 October, 2009 50- 2628(E).—— Whereas, the Cauvery Water Disputes Tribunal (hereinafier referred to the said Tribuna‘lfwas constituted on 2'ld ‘June, I990 vide notification number S.0.437(E) under section 4 of the Inter-Stew River Water Disputes Act, [95603 of [956) for the adjudication of the water disputes regnrding Inter-State river Cauvery and river valley thereof; - And whereas the said Tribunal was required to submit its report and decision under sub-section (2) of section 5 ofthe said Act on or before 5" Augu‘sr, 2005; And whereas the Central Government, vide notification number S.0.980(E), dated the l2"I July, 2005 had extended the period of submission of report and decision for a further period of one year with effect Roth 6" August, 2005; And whereas the Central Government vide notifiwtion number S.0.l399(E), dated I" September, .2006 extended the period of submission ofreport and decision for a further period'ofsix months with effect from 6" August, 2006; And whereas the said Tribunal submitted its report and decision under Mn(2) of section 5 of the said Act on 5" February, 2007; And whereas the party States and Central Government made further reference to the said Tribunal ‘ ' under the proviso m sub-section(3) of section 5 ofthe said Act on 27" April, 2007, 30" April, 2007 and 3" May, 2007 and the Tribunal bad to submit a further report within one year from 3"l May, 2007; And whereas the Central Government, on request of the said Tribunal, vide notification number 8.0. 1164(E), dated 16‘” May, 2008 extended the period of submission [of firrther report by the said Tribunal for a further period of six month with effect fi’om 3" May, 2008; and again vide notification number 3.0. 2506(E), dated 23"1 October, 2008 extended the period of submission of further report by the said Tribunal for a further period of one year with efi'ect from 3" November, 2008; And, whereas the said Tribunal has again requested to extend the period of submission of further report ; Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by proviso to sub-section (3) of section 5 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby extends the period of submission of further report by the said Tribunal for a further period of one year with effect from 3"1 November, 2009. _ [F_No. l/1/2005-BM] S.
